violations.text: Various food items were observed stored in the stand-up freezer without covers. Food items shall be stored covered to prevent potential for cross contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the prep area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the door tracks within sliding door units and cooking line backsplash have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Equipment and non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency to prevent the accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (exterior of 2 door refrigerator) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023

Left side oil disposal unit was observed on dirt and grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recycables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023

The walls in the walk-in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023

Fried eggrolls and noodles were observed held at 45 and 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were voluntarily disposed by owner. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
Non-food grade containers were observed used to store food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. shelves in walk-in cooler 2. shelves in storage room 3. interior of pork smoker/roaster 4. shelves in 1 door freezer (ice accumulation) 5. exterior of 2 door refrigerator New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
Faucets at 3 bay sink and handsink in restroom were observed leaking. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

The oil disposal units outside is located on dirt and grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

Enclosure for refuse was observed with some rat droppings and overgrown leaf foliage. Areas for refuse, returnables, and recyclables must be maintained clean and free of litter and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
Lighting in storage room was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage room (refrigerator and equipment). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: 1. walls and floors in walk-in cooler 2. kitchen hoods The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
Ceiling tiles in the restroom and storage room were observed in poor repair (water damage or missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
Caulking at bathroom handsink was observed in poor repair and with black residue. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
